title: aster uniligulatus
intro: Aster uniligulatus, also known as the Single-leaved Aster, is a flowering plant species within the Asteraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving fever, reducing swelling, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Aster uniligulatus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and steeping them in hot water or a solvent.
